title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Biocon

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Biocon
jsonLd.description:
Biocon has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
